zh.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp於大約1022年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Walter de Beauchamp16歲，母親Bertha de Braose34歲。她和Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne至少有1個兒子。她去世於1066年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年45歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Cambus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Flavio, Innocenzo, Leonardo, Roberto, Salvatore.
Italian (Sardinia): from a Sardinian variant of   Campi  .

variants.name: Campi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Florio, Domenic, Enrico, Silvio.
Italian:
habitational name from any of various places called Campi, or a topographic name from the plural of campo ‘field’ (see Campo ).

nameMeanings.name: Bellus
meanings: Assyrian: The sun

en.lifeSummary: When Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp was born about 1022, in Normandy, France, her father, Walter de Beauchamp, was 16 and her mother, Bertha de Braose, was 34. She had at least 1 son with Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne. She died in 1066, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 45, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp est née environ 1022, à Normandie, France, son père, Walter de Beauchamp, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Bertha de Braose, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne. Elle est décédée en 1066, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp um 1022 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Beauchamp 16 und ihre Mutter Bertha de Braose 34. Sie hatte mit Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1066 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp è nata il circa 1022 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Walter de Beauchamp, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Bertha de Braose, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne. Morì nel 1066, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchampが約1022年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Walter de Beauchampは16歳，母Bertha de Braoseは34歳であった。彼女はArt Armdhearg Ó Duibhneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1066年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで45歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난
ko.lifeSummary: Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1022년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Beauchamp(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha de Braose(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1066년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1022, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Walter de Beauchamp, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Bertha de Braose, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne. Ela faleceu em 1066, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp родилась около 1022 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Walter de Beauchamp было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha de Braose, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Art Armdhearg Ó Duibhne. Она умерла в 1066 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.
